highlights: The AI landscape is marked by significant advancements in frontier models, with OpenAI's GPT-5.6 driving enterprise applications and new open-source models like Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 pushing contextual understanding.

Developer tools and agentic frameworks are rapidly maturing, offering enhanced capabilities for browser-based AI inference, robust agent memory solutions, and open-source harnesses for building sophisticated AI agents.

A strong emphasis is emerging on the practical deployment and governance of AI, with OpenAI introducing AI investment scorecards and new frameworks addressing critical aspects like AI-native insurance for agentic systems.

agents.title: ChatGPT is Now a Partner for Your Most Ambitious Work
agents.summary: OpenAI has positioned ChatGPT Work as an autonomous agent capable of executing long-horizon projects across apps and files, transforming complex goals into finished work for enterprise users.

agents.title: SPINE: Bridging the Cyber-Physical Gap with Agentic AI
agents.summary: A new agentic framework, SPINE, is introduced to streamline the debugging and deployment of bimanual robots, significantly reducing the need for expert calibration and speeding up embodied AI operationalization.

agents.title: OpenAI Details GPT-Red: An Internal Automated Red-Teaming Model
agents.summary: OpenAI developed GPT-Red, an internal attacker model trained via self-play, which outperformed human red-teamers in identifying prompt injection vulnerabilities, improving AI safety and robustness for defender LLMs like GPT-5.6 Sol.

models.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier Intelligence That Scales With Your Ambition
models.summary: OpenAI releases GPT-5.6, touted as a frontier intelligence model offering superior performance per dollar and enhanced capabilities for complex tasks, marking a significant step forward in scalable AI ambition.

models.title: Moonshot AI Releases Kimi K3: A 2.8 Trillion Parameter Open MoE Model With 1M Context
models.summary: Moonshot AI introduced Kimi K3, a massive 2.8-trillion-parameter open Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model featuring Kimi Delta Attention and a 1-million-token context window, expanding the frontier for large-scale open models.

models.title: NVIDIA AI Releases Nemotron 3 Embed: An Open Embedding Collection Ranks #1 on RTEB
models.summary: NVIDIA AI released Nemotron 3 Embed, an open embedding collection with an 8B checkpoint that achieved the #1 ranking on RTEB, offering high-performance retrieval accuracy and support for 32,768-token inputs.

tools.title: Google Releases LiteRT.js: A JavaScript Binding of LiteRT That Runs .tflite Models in Browsers via WebGPU
tools.summary: Google introduced LiteRT.js, a JavaScript binding enabling direct execution of .tflite models in browsers using WebAssembly and WebGPU, delivering up to 60x performance gains for on-device inference.

tools.title: Oracle Agent Memory as an Enterprise Memory Substrate for Long-Horizon AI Agents
tools.summary: This report details Oracle Agent Memory, a database-native memory substrate built on Oracle Database to address the complex lifecycle of state retention, retrieval, and revision required for practical, long-horizon AI agents in enterprise deployments.

tools.title: SpaceXAI Open-Sources Grok Build: The Rust Agent Harness, TUI, and Tool Layer Behind Its Coding CLI
tools.summary: SpaceXAI has open-sourced Grok Build, providing the Rust agent harness, terminal user interface (TUI), and tool dispatch layer that powers its coding CLI, enabling developers to build similar agentic systems.

companies.title: A Scorecard for the AI Age
companies.summary: OpenAI's CFO, Sarah Friar, introduced a practical AI scorecard for enterprises to measure ROI by focusing on useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute, guiding strategic AI investments.

companies.title: GPT-5.6 Is Now the Preferred Model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
companies.summary: OpenAI announced that GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model powering Microsoft 365 Copilot, delivering enhanced AI capabilities across Microsoft's productivity suite for faster and higher-quality work.

companies.title: AI-Native Insurance for Agentic AI: Pricing, Underwriting, and End-to-End Automation
companies.summary: This paper develops an AI-native mathematical framework for underwriting, pricing, and contract design tailored for agentic AI deployments, addressing new insurance challenges posed by autonomous AI systems.

learning.title: Patter SDK Guide to Building a Restaurant Booking Phone Agent with Dynamic Variables, Guardrails, Latency Dashboards, and Eval Checks
learning.summary: This guide provides a comprehensive walkthrough of building a robust voice agent for restaurant bookings using the Patter SDK, covering dynamic variables, guardrails, performance tracking, and evaluation checks for real-world deployment.

learning.title: Building a Gin Config Controlled PyTorch Pipeline with Configurable MLP Variants, Cosine Scheduling, and Runtime Parameter Overrides
learning.summary: A detailed guide on constructing a flexible PyTorch training pipeline using Gin Config, allowing experiment variables to be managed via `.gin` files and enabling runtime parameter overrides without modifying source code.

learning.title: Getting Started with ChatGPT
learning.summary: An introductory guide from OpenAI providing fundamental steps to use ChatGPT, helping new users start conversations and discover effective ways to write, brainstorm, and solve problems with AI.
